title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.790 - Officer not liable, when
text:
521.790.  Officer not liable, when. — When said sheriff or other officer aforesaid shall take an indemnification bond as aforesaid with good and sufficient security, he shall not be liable to such claimant for any damage or injury sustained by such claimant in consequence of such levy or sale under or by virtue of such execution or attachment.
(RSMo 1939 § 15689) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14741
